old_claim.note: Electronics provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No direct dependency remains from the broad semiconductor-materials node to electronics; the scoped semiconductor effect predates practical electronics as modeled in this graph.

source_shape.source_locator: Milestone text describing Braun's 1874 galena point-contact rectifier and later noting Fleming's 1904 valve as the first practical electronic device.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The CHM milestone places semiconductor point-contact rectification in 1874 and distinguishes it from the later 1904 Fleming valve practical electronic device.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: This rejects electronics as a prerequisite because the scoped semiconductor node is now the earlier material/rectifier effect rather than the later electronics industry built from it.

ontology_before: The broad Semiconductors node carried a later electronics prerequisite, making the 1904 electronics field appear upstream of the 1874 semiconductor rectifier effect.
ontology_after: The Semiconductors node is scoped to semiconductor materials and early rectifier behavior; electronics remains downstream/enabling context for later transistor and circuit nodes.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: later electronics no longer reaches every semiconductor dependent through the broad semiconductors node. Preserved: transistor and circuit nodes still directly model electronics where relevant.
would_reject_if: The semiconductors node were intentionally narrowed to mean post-1904 electronic semiconductor devices only.
A stronger source showed that the scoped 1874 semiconductor rectifier effect required prior electronics technology rather than electrical measurement and crystalline materials.
Removing the edge also removed electronics context from transistor or integrated-circuit nodes where that context remains relevant.
short_reason: Semiconductor rectification predates practical electronics in this graph, so electronics is not a prerequisite for the broad semiconductors node.
